title: Trust lane: browser-QA findings + fail-loud sweep
description: Bounded T0/T1 packets from the 2026-07-11 Fable blueprint session (docs/BLUEPRINT.md). Every packet stems from live browser-QA evidence or the Codex audit Card C. T2 items (LAN bind, SSRF, agent_runner states) are deliberately excluded - those are escalated to Codex/Jacob.

packets.title: What's Next card: explicit error state instead of infinite loading
packets.objective: When GET /session/context or the next-step query fails (404/5xx/network), the home What's Next card must render an explicit error with a retry control instead of 'loading...' forever. Observed live 2026-07-11: a stale gateway 404'd /session/context and the card spun indefinitely.
acceptance_criteria: A mocked failing /session/context renders a visible error message and retry button, not a loading state
Retry re-issues the request and recovers when the mock succeeds

packets.title: Doctor check: gateway process older than checked-out code
packets.objective: Add a doctor check that warns when the running gateway process started before the newest mtime of gateway/*.py (stale code serving). Observed live 2026-07-11: gateway ran pre-14f5865 code, 404ing routes that exist in the checkout, while doctor reported healthy.
acceptance_criteria: ./kitty doctor --json emits a WARN-level check when the gateway process predates the newest gateway source mtime
PASS when the process is newer
Unit test covers both branches with fake timestamps
python3.12 -m pytest tests/ -q passes for the touched test files

packets.title: Chat composer: Enter sends, Shift+Enter newlines
packets.objective: Observed live 2026-07-11: pressing Enter in the chat composer does not send; only the send button does. Make Enter send the message and Shift+Enter insert a newline, matching standard chat convention.
acceptance_criteria: Enter in a non-empty composer dispatches the same send path as the send button
Shift+Enter inserts a newline and does not send
Enter on an empty composer does nothing
make ui-test passes with new coverage for all three cases

packets.title: Mobile: mascot must not overlap interactive controls
packets.objective: Observed live 2026-07-11 at 375px width: the doodle cat overlaps the 'sweep' button on the deadlines card. Constrain or hide decorative mascots so they never cover interactive elements at mobile widths.
acceptance_criteria: At 375px viewport the sweep button is fully visible and clickable

packets.title: Fail-loud sweep: memories + monitors gateway paths
packets.objective: Audit Card C, first slice: in gateway memories and monitors modules, replace silent 'except: return []/None/False' fallbacks with typed raises or explicit error envelopes, following the landed pattern in gateway/model_digest.py and gateway/next_step.py.
acceptance_criteria: No bare silent-fallback except blocks remain in the touched modules (grep-verifiable)
Each converted path has a regression test proving the error surfaces
Happy-path behavior and response shapes consumed by the frontend are unchanged
python3.12 -m pytest tests/ -q passes for the touched test files
